GAME SETTINGS

50%

KEYBOARD & MOUSE

  • WASD: Move Operative
  • Mouse: Aim weapon
  • Left-Click: Shoot
  • R: Reload magazine
  • F: Toggle flashlight
  • Space: Dash (10s cooldown)
  • Shift: Sprint
  • 1 / 2: Switch weapon slots
  • 3 / Scroll: Throw flashbang
  • Enter: Open / send chat

PS5 / CONTROLLER

  • Left Stick: Move
  • Right Stick: Aim
  • R2: Shoot
  • Circle (O): Reload
  • Cross (X): Dash
  • Triangle: Toggle flashlight
  • Square: Throw flashbang
  • L1: Primary weapon
  • R1: Knife / secondary
  • L3 (hold stick): Sprint
TACTICSTRIKE INTELLIGENCE FEED

DAILY NEWS UPDATE

⚡ BATTLEPASS UPDATE: Battlepasses will be added later today! Prepare for the long, hard grind to unlock exclusive titles, weapons, and seasonal rewards.

🤝 SPECIAL PARTNERSHIP: In collaboration with BANKZITTERSRATINGS! Expect custom ratings, rankings, and exclusive partnership integration coming very soon.

TACTICSTRIKE CHANGELOG

WHAT'S NEW

🕶️ FIRST PERSON MATCH MODE: NEW
Lock into a full 3D viewport with pointer-lock. Run across tactical maps from a premium first-person perspective using a beautiful female elf model and procedural weapon bobs.

🧱 AAA 2.5D WALL EXTRUSION: NEW
Experience top-down battle with perspective-extruded 3D walls, furniture, and crates. Obstacles dynamically project height relative to the player's view, creating a high-fidelity 2.5D visual aesthetic.

💻 HACKING TERMINALS & MINIGAMES: NEW
Interactive supply terminals have been added. Stand near a console and hold [E] to engage. Completing the timed key-sequence defusal hacking minigame successfully drops high-tier items (Adrenaline/Medkits).

🎒 TACTICAL DROPS & INVENTORY: NEW
Stash pickups collected while at full capacity in your new tactical inventory slots. Press [H] to drop a stashed Medkit or [J] to drop an Ammo Pack on the ground to share with allies or save for later.

⚔️ WEAPON XP & LEVELING: NEW
Earn Weapon XP (+10 on hit, +50 on kill) to level up your gun. Watch your leveling progress directly in the HUD with a stashed progress tracker and golden center-screen announcements.

⚠️

DESKTOP ONLY REQUIRED

TacticStrike is a high-speed competitive top-down tactical shooter optimized for desktop displays, keyboard/mouse, and gamepads. Mobile devices are currently not supported.

Please connect from a PC or laptop

TERMINAL HACK IN PROGRESS

TYPE THE KEY SEQUENCE BEFORE TIMER EXPIRES

PRESS [ESC] TO CANCEL HACK
